flags.label: Median federal debt at exit
flags.summary: Median federal debt at exit at Los Angeles Valley College rose 50% between 2007 and 2010 ($3.0k → $4.5k).

flags.label: In-state tuition
flags.summary: In-state tuition at Los Angeles Valley College rose 19% between 2007 and 2010 ($590 → $700).

flags.label: Out-of-state tuition
flags.summary: Out-of-state tuition at Los Angeles Valley College rose 17% between 2021 and 2024 ($9.0k → $10.6k).

flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment at Los Angeles Valley College rose 120% between 2007 and 2010 (8.1k → 17.8k).
